name: Apple Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bran, flour, baking powder, nutmeg and cloves; set aside.
2. Cream together milk, eggs, maple syrup, and butter.
3. Fold in the flour mixture.
4. Stir in apples and raisins.
5. Pour into oiled muffin tins.
6. Bake at 350 degrees until tops split, 15 to 25 minutes.
